Video.summary: Chef Chris Scott welcomes Matthew into his New Jersey home to whip up his legendary biscuit recipe.
Video.title: Chris Scott: A Top Chef Talks Biscuits, Jazz and Aprons

Image.alt: Chris Scott: A Top Chef Talks Biscuits, Jazz and Aprons
Chris Scott: A Top Chef Talks Biscuits, Jazz and Aprons

Video.summary: Chef and restaurateur Melba Wilson schools Matthew on the art of her legendary shrimp and grits.
Video.title: Melba Wilson: A Harlem Icon

Video.summary: Matthew visits Carnie Wilson's Los Angeles home to whip up her Fall-to-Your-Knees Mac and Cheese.
Video.title: Carnie Wilson: Rock Royalty's Infamous Mac and Cheese

Image.alt: Carnie Wilson: Rock Royalty's Infamous Mac and Cheese
Carnie Wilson: Rock Royalty's Infamous Mac and Cheese

Video.summary: Leah stops by recording artist Zac Brown's wilderness retreat and TV star Toya Wright's pristine palace.
Video.title: Zac Brown & Toya Wright

Video.summary: Anne-Marie Barton invites you through the gate to this stately, traditional yet modern home.
Video.title: Historical Modern Heirloom Estate

Video.summary: From sowing to reaping, everything Nina and Brendon do is connected to the rhythm of the seasons.
Video.title: A Season for Everything

Video.summary: Sabrina's guests bring the burn, talk ultra-chic wardrobes, and share a budget-friendly dinner plan.
Video.title: The High Low Life

Video.summary: It’s time for hands to get dirty as Nina unearths the wonders of good soil.
Video.title: Good Soil

Video.summary: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.
Video.title: The Gambin's "Offline"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies gets a look at the Pipe Dream - equal parts sport machine and floating celebration.
Video.title: Captain Cholly's "Pipe Dream"

Video.summary: Meet Nina and Brendan, who swapped sound checks for soil and left life on the road for life on a farm.
Video.title: Welcome to the Farm

Video.summary: Nina proves that citrus trees teach us valuable things about seasons and relationships.
Video.title: Fields not Factories

Video.summary: Nina and Brendon’s walk through the dark valley leads to unforeseen miracles and joy.
Video.title: After the Rain

Video.summary: As the Shirley family farm continues to grow, so does the community it celebrates.
Video.title: The Joy of Sharing

Video.summary: Captain Boomies tours Wharf Rat, a Bahamian-blue beauty built for fun, travel, and serious sport.
Video.title: Captain Gill's "Wharf Rat"

Video.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.
Video.title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch gives you a personal tour of her timeless Brentwood, TN home.
Video.title: Designer's Dwelling: Family-Friendly Glam

Video.summary: Darrel and Patrice of Maxam Hotels embark on an epic journey to build a tiny home resort.
Video.title: The Blueprint

Video.summary: Darrel and Patrice begin construction, laying the foundation for the resort.
Video.title: Foundations

Video.summary: The tension begins to mount as the deadline looms larger.
Video.title: The Drop

Video.summary: It’s all hands-on deck at the resort and the team is working around the clock.
Video.title: Down to the Wire

Video.summary: With power finally in place, the Maxams begin to ready the resort for opening.
Video.title: Sewing Up Loose Ends

Video.summary: The town of Sodus shows up as the Maxams unveil The Finger Lakes Treehouse Resort.
Video.title: Ribbon Cutting

Video.summary: Boost your efficiency with life hacks from Chellie Carlson, Danielle Walker, and Trish Suhr.
Video.title: Chic Hacks: Style, Flights & Gluten-Free Delights

Chic Hacks: Style, Flights & Gluten-Free Delights

Video.summary: Join Sabrina for small, intentional changes that can create a big ripple effect in your daily life.
Video.title: Design Your Life, Build Your Wealth, Love Your Skin

Design Your Life, Build Your Wealth, Love Your Skin

Video.summary: Join Sabrina for a masterclass in stress-free hosting, ambiance, and the very best cosmic vibes.
Video.title: Stars & Celebrations

Video.summary: Leah heads to Dana Spinola's posh pad and NFL veteran Matt Schaub's mega mansion.
Video.title: Dana Spinola & Matt Schaub

Video.summary: Designer Michelle Boudreau's vibrant mid-century modern renovation.
Video.title: Vibrant Mid-Century Modern Renovation

Video.summary: Leah heads to comedian George Wallace's hotel-chic penthouse and Superbowl MVP Hines Ward's contemporary crib.
Video.title: George Wallace & Hines Ward

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Andrea and her sister Sabrina head to spectacular Los Cabos for the adventure of a lifetime.
Video.title: Living It Up in Los Cabos

Video.summary: Leia T. Ward pays homage to the waterfront views in this modern coastal house.
Video.title: Modern Waterfront Beach House

Video.summary: Michelle Boudreau brings Morocco to life in this Palm Springs vacation home.
Video.title: Moroccan Modern

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.summary: TEH REVEAL: E25

Video.summary: Peek inside Los Angeles-based designer Dani Dazey’s pink bungalow in Highland Park, California.
Video.title: Prismatic & Patterned LA Bungalow

Video.summary: Designer Barrie Livingstone guides you through this tranquil Malibu beach house.
Video.title: Tranquil & Modern Malibu Beach House

Video.summary: Andrea Schumacher invites you into her Colorado home, which tells the story of her life and travels.
Video.title: Artful & Eclectic Designer Dwelling

Video.title: Choosing Chappaqua & Collingswood
